product_overview: A single-page portfolio site served by Flask that dynamically loads content from a JSON store and provides interactive sections (hero, about, capabilities, projects, metrics, skills, experience, contact) plus an AI chatbot and admin content management APIs.
core_goals: Serve a performant, single-page portfolio that fetches content from a JSON-backed API (/api/content) and injects it into all site sections.
Provide reliable contact and chatbot integrations (POST /api/contact, POST /api/chat) with clear fallback behavior on failure.
Enable an admin workflow to update content.json via authenticated endpoints (POST /api/content) and to manage sessions (POST /api/login, POST /api/logout).
Deliver polished UX: smooth sidebar navigation, responsive project slider & gallery, GSAP-powered animations, and PDF preview for resumes.

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Left fixed sidebar on desktop and slide-in drawer on mobile. Links smooth-scroll to page sections and update active state via IntersectionObserver.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with content JSON including section labels and order -> Frontend binds labels to sidebar links and uses scrollIntoView for navigation
GET /api/content -> Receive 500 or network error -> GET /static/default-content.json -> Receive 200 with fallback navigation labels -> Frontend builds sidebar with fallback labels

features.name: Dynamic Content Loading
features.description: Fetch the canonical content JSON on page load and populate Hero, About, Capabilities, Projects, Metrics, Skills, Experience, and Contact sections.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with full content JSON (hero, about, projects, metrics, skills, experience, contact, media) -> Frontend injects data into DOM for all sections
GET /api/content -> Request times out or returns 500 -> GET /static/default-content.json -> Receive 200 with default/fallback JSON -> Frontend injects fallback content and logs warning

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Top-of-page hero with profile photo, animated title/subtitle/description and CTA buttons that trigger scroll or modals.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with hero.media.profile_home and hero.subtitle/desc -> GET /img/<profile_home_path> -> Receive 200 image -> Hero displays image, subtitle, desc and CTA buttons

GET /api/content -> Receive 200 missing hero.media.profile_home or GET /img/<profile_home_path> -> 404 -> GET /img/picture.jpg -> Receive 200 fallback image -> Hero displays fallback image and shows console warning

features.name: About Section
features.description: About area populated from content JSON: bio, stats grid, profile photo, and quote.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with about.bio, about.stats[], about.quote and media.profile_about -> GET /img/<profile_about_path> -> Receive 200 image -> About section populates bio, stats, quote and profile image
GET /api/content -> Receive 200 but about keys missing -> GET /static/default-about.json -> Receive 200 fallback about content -> About section renders fallback content

features.name: Capabilities Section
features.description: Six capability cards loaded from content JSON; desktop uses GSAP + VanillaTilt animations, mobile shows horizontal slider.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with capabilities[] (6 cards) including titles, items and background media -> GET /img/<capability_bg> -> Receive 200 backgrounds -> Frontend renders cards and triggers GSAP ScrollTrigger animation on section entry

GET /api/content -> Receive 200 but GSAP fails to initialize (animation library missing) -> GET /static/capabilities-fallback.json -> Receive 200 fallback capability data -> Frontend applies CSS fallback styles and sets card opacity to 1 after safety timeout

features.name: Projects Slider
features.description: Draggable project card slider with arrow and dot navigation; clicking a thumbnail opens the gallery modal.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with projects[] containing thumbnail paths and galleries -> GET /img/<project_thumbnail> -> Receive 200 -> User drags or clicks arrows; frontend transitions slider to selected card and updates dots

GET /api/content -> Receive 200 but project thumbnail GET /img/<thumbnail> -> 404 -> GET /img/placeholder.jpg -> Receive 200 -> Project card displays placeholder thumbnail and dot navigation still functions

features.name: Gallery Modal
features.description: Fullscreen image/PDF viewer opened from a project card; supports prev/next navigation and media served from server.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with selected project.gallery array of media paths -> GET /img/<media_1> -> Receive 200 -> Gallery modal opens showing media 1 with prev/next controls calling GET /img/<media_n> as user navigates
GET /api/content -> Receive 200 but GET /img/<media_2> -> 500 or 404 -> GET /img/<next_available_media> -> Receive 200 -> Gallery displays available media and shows an error caption for missing item

features.name: Resume / Portfolio PDF Preview
features.description: Modal to pick and preview either 'PM' or 'Operations' resume PDFs rendered in an iframe using server-served PDF assets.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with media.resume_pm and media.resume_ops paths -> GET /img/<resume_pm.pdf> -> Receive 200 -> Preview modal opens with iframe loading the PM resume PDF

GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with media.resume_ops path but GET /img/<resume_ops.pdf> -> 404 -> GET /img/<resume_fallback_download> -> Receive 200 -> Modal shows download link and fallback document

features.name: Metrics Section
features.description: 3x3 grid of metric cards populated dynamically from metrics[] in content JSON with reveal animations.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with metrics[] (9 items) -> Frontend injects metrics into #dyn-metrics-grid and IntersectionObserver triggers reveal animation when in viewport
GET /api/content -> Receive 200 but metrics[] length < 9 -> GET /static/metrics-fallback.json -> Receive 200 -> Frontend completes grid with fallback metrics and marks missing items as 'N/A'

features.name: Skills Section
features.description: Skill groups with colored tags loaded from skills[]; groups and tag colors (orange/purple/default) are rendered dynamically.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with skills[] grouping and tag color metadata -> Frontend renders 4 skill groups with colored tags and any highlighted skills
GET /api/content -> Receive 500 -> GET /static/skills-fallback.json -> Receive 200 -> Frontend renders reduced skill set from fallback file and logs a console warning

features.name: Experience Timeline
features.description: Vertical timeline populated from experience[] with company logos, dates and descriptions; uses reveal animations on scroll.
user_flows: GET /api/content -> Receive 200 with experience[] entries including logo paths -> GET /img/<company_logo> -> Receive 200 -> Timeline displays entries and IntersectionObserver triggers reveal per item
GET /api/content -> Receive 200 but GET /img/<company_logo> -> 404 -> Timeline displays text-only entry with placeholder logo from GET /img/placeholder.jpg

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Name/email/message form submitted to server; backend attempts SMTP send and frontend falls back to EmailJS on SMTP failure. Shows success/error states.
user_flows: POST /api/contact with body {"from_name":"Alice","from_email":"a@ex.com","message":"Hi"} -> Receive 200 {"ok": true} -> Frontend shows success toast
POST /api/contact with body missing required fields -> Receive 400 with validation error -> Frontend shows form validation error message
POST /api/contact with valid body -> Receive 503 (SMTP misconfigured) -> Frontend POSTs to EmailJS service (fallback) -> Receive 200 -> Frontend shows fallback-success message

features.name: Chatbot (AI Assistant)
features.description: Floating chat widget that sends user messages to backend; backend calls Gemini and returns replies. Shows quick example buttons and handles API/key errors.
user_flows: POST /api/chat with body {"message":"Tell me about Kevin's projects"} -> Receive 200 {"reply":"..."} within 30s -> Frontend displays AI reply in chat window
POST /api/chat with empty message -> Receive 400 validation error -> Frontend shows 'please enter a message' error
POST /api/chat with body but backend Gemini API key missing -> Receive 200 with basic fallback reply -> Frontend displays fallback reply and logs Gemini key warning

features.name: Admin Panel / Content Management
features.description: Admin HTML UI at /admin that allows authenticated users to edit content.json and upload media (Cloudinary). Requires session-based auth.
user_flows: POST /api/login with body {"email":"admin@ex.com","password":"secret"} -> Receive 200 {"ok": true} and session cookie set -> GET /api/auth -> Receive 200 {"loggedIn": true} -> Admin UI enables save

POST /api/content with updated content JSON while authenticated -> Receive 200 {"ok": true, "message":"저장 완료!"} and content.json file mtime updated -> Subsequent GET /api/content returns updated content
POST /api/content without session cookie -> Receive 401 unauthorized -> Admin UI shows login required error

features.name: Sidebar Navigation
features.description: Fixed sidebar on desktop, slide-in drawer on mobile with hamburger toggle. Nav links smooth-scroll to each section and close the mobile sidebar first.

features.name: Dynamic Content Loading
features.description: Fetches /api/content on page load and populates Hero, About, Capabilities, Projects, Metrics, Skills, Experience, Contact sections.

features.name: Hero Section
features.description: Profile photo, animated title, subtitle, desc, CTA buttons (Projects, Contact)

features.name: About Section
features.description: Bio, stats grid (3-across), and profile photo

features.name: Capabilities Section
features.description: 3D tilt cards with GSAP animation on desktop; horizontal scroll slider with left/right arrow buttons on mobile

features.name: Projects Slider
features.description: Draggable card slider showing project thumbnails. Click opens gallery modal. Dot navigation and arrow buttons.

features.name: Metrics Section
features.description: 3x3 grid of stat numbers and labels (loaded dynamically)

features.name: Skills Section
features.description: Skill groups with colored tags (orange/purple/default)

features.name: Experience Timeline
features.description: Vertical timeline with company logos, game titles, and task descriptions

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Name/email/message form submitted to /api/contact with EmailJS fallback. Shows success/error status.

features.name: Chatbot
features.description: Floating compact chat button on mobile (48x48px icon), full button on desktop. Opens chat window powered by Gemini.

features.name: Gallery Modal
features.description: Full-screen image/PDF gallery triggered by clicking project thumbnails. Previous/next navigation.

features.name: Resume/Portfolio PDF Preview
features.description: Picker modal to select PM or Operations resume PDF, opens in preview modal

known_limitations.issue: Sidebar nav links require menu to close (overflow:hidden cleared) before smooth scroll can execute
known_limitations.impact: Navigation scroll may not work if closure and scroll are not sequenced correctly

known_limitations.issue: Capabilities cards start at opacity 0 (GSAP-controlled); safety timeout forces opacity:1 after 3s if GSAP fails
known_limitations.impact: Cards may briefly appear invisible on mobile
